title: Kenyan Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy beef stir fry inspired by Kenyan cuisine, made with tender beef and a variety of spices.

ingredients.name: Tender beef strips
ingredients.notes: Slice the beef into thin strips before using.

ingredients.name: Fermented Kenyan stir fry paste
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade stir fry paste.

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir fry paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the beef is cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
